Skip to contents
gleifr 0.1.0
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Fetch ISINs for a LEI

Source: R/gleifr.R
lei_isins.Rd

Fetches the ISINs associated with a given LEI.

Usage

lei_isins(id, limit = 200L)

Arguments

id

(character(1))
The Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) to fetch ISINs for.

limit

(NULL | integer(1))
Maximum number of records to return. Default 200L. Use NULL to fetch all.

Value

A data.frame() with columns:

  • lei: The Legal Entity Identifier

  • isin: The ISIN

Examples

# \donttest{
lei_isins("529900W18LQJJN6SJ336")
#>                      lei         isin
#> 1   529900W18LQJJN6SJ336 DE000SH2JNC6
#> 2   529900W18LQJJN6SJ336 DE000SX8D4D3
#> 3   529900W18LQJJN6SJ336 DE000SH7XGQ0
#> 4   529900W18LQJJN6SJ336 DE000FE6P302
#> 5   529900W18LQJJN6SJ336 DE000SX6XUT7
#> 6   529900W18LQJJN6SJ336 DE000SD23PS3
#> 7   529900W18LQJJN6SJ336 DE000SX7YS02
#> 8   529900W18LQJJN6SJ336 DE000SX7FR97
#> 9   529900W18LQJJN6SJ336 DE000SX8QQS7
#> 10  529900W18LQJJN6SJ336 DE000SB1FWD1
#> 11  529900W18LQJJN6SJ336 DE000SX76KP6
#> 12  529900W18LQJJN6SJ336 DE000SX57WH8
#> 13  529900W18LQJJN6SJ336 DE000FE6W142
#> 14  529900W18LQJJN6SJ336 DE000SB37QJ4
#> 15  529900W18LQJJN6SJ336 DE000SH224V4
#> 16  529900W18LQJJN6SJ336 DE000SH2P1G7
#> 17  529900W18LQJJN6SJ336 DE000SX68F47
#> 18  529900W18LQJJN6SJ336 DE000SX7KMM4
#> 19  529900W18LQJJN6SJ336 DE000SX8VU83
